name: Arduino Raspberry Pi Pico
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arduino/arduino-cli/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin && arduino-cli core install -b rp2040:rp2040 && apt-get install -y arm-none-eabi-gcc arm-none-eabi-g++ arm-none-eabi-gdb
